summary: Invoice Engine Phase 1 Complete - All 32 backend tests pass, Frontend UI fully functional. Tested: create-from-booking (idempotent), create-manual, list/filter invoices, dashboard stats, invoice detail, issue/cancel (state machine), booking invoice check, events timeline, decision engine. E-document provider is MOCKED (MockEFaturaProvider).
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice Engine API at /api/invoices/* fully implemented with proper state machine, decision engine, and idempotency
BookingDetailDrawer has 'Faturayı Kes' button at line ~1344 with data-testid='fatura-kes-btn'
AdminEFaturaPage (Fatura Motoru) page properly implements dashboard stats, filters, wizard, detail modal
Decision engine correctly returns 'draft_only' when no integrator is configured
MOCKED: MockEFaturaProvider is used - no real e-document integrator connected

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI loads, wizard works, filters work, all data-testid present)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed invoice data for isolated testing. Manual cleanup via MongoDB if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice Engine Phase 1 fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/invoices/create-from-booking (idempotent), POST /api/invoices/create-manual, GET /api/invoices (list with status/source_type filters), GET /api/invoices/dashboard, GET /api/invoices/{id}, POST /api/invoices/{id}/issue, POST /api/invoices/{id}/cancel, GET /api/invoices/booking/{booking_id}, GET /api/invoices/{id}/events. Frontend at /app/admin/efatura has dashboard stats, Yeni Fatura wizard (3 steps), filter buttons, invoice table with actions. MockEFaturaProvider is used since no real integrator configured.

backend.POST /api/invoices/create-from-booking: PASS - creates invoice from booking, idempotent (same booking_id returns same invoice)
backend.POST /api/invoices/create-manual: PASS - creates manual invoice with lines, calculates totals correctly
backend.GET /api/invoices: PASS - lists invoices with status/source_type filters, pagination
backend.GET /api/invoices/dashboard: PASS - returns total, draft, issued, failed, cancelled counts and financials
backend.POST /api/invoices/{invoice_id}/cancel: PASS - transitions to cancelled, sets cancelled_at
backend.GET /api/invoices/booking/{booking_id}: PASS - checks if booking has invoice
backend.GET /api/invoices/{invoice_id}/events: PASS - returns event timeline with types and timestamps
backend.Idempotency: PASS - creating invoice from same booking twice returns same invoice_id
backend.State machine: PASS - only valid transitions allowed, invalid transitions return 400
backend.Decision engine: PASS - returns draft_only when no integrator, would return e_fatura/e_arsiv with integrator

frontend.Invoice Engine page (/app/admin/efatura): PASS - loads with dashboard stats, filters, invoice table
frontend.Dashboard stats display: PASS - shows Toplam Fatura, Kesildi, Basarisiz, Gelir
frontend.Wizard Step 1: PASS - Rezervasyondan Fatura / Manuel Fatura options
frontend.Wizard Step 2: PASS - Customer info form with B2B/B2C toggle, VKN/TCKN fields
frontend.Wizard Step 3: PASS - Invoice lines input with totals calculation
frontend.Filter buttons: PASS - Tumu, Taslak, Kesildi, Basarisiz, Iptal
frontend.Kes action buttons: PASS - visible for draft invoices in table

mocked_apis.e_document_provider: MockEFaturaProvider - auto-accepts all invoice submissions, no real GIB/e-document integration
